name: Boya BY-WM3T-M2 Wireless Microphone
description: The BY-WM3T2 series is extremely compact and lightweight, and it is easy to get started as long as you connect the receiver to your device.

features.Key Features:: 2.4GHz wireless microphone system | Ultra-compact and portable | Compatible with cameras and devices with 3.5mm jack | Built-in omnidirectional microphone for 360° sound pickup | Selectable noise canceling | Automatic pairing & plug and play | Built-in rechargeable TX battery lasts up to 10 hours | Operating range 50m
features.What's in the box?: 1x RX receiver | 2x TX transmitter | 1x Charging box | 1x USB-C charging cable | 2x foam windshield
